meaning: v.闪烁,闪耀,(使)闪光n.闪烁,发光,牛眼
examples: At night, lights twinkle in distant cabins across the valleys.
Do you know why the stars twinkle so merrily?
"Yes, there is!" I say with a magical twinkle.
The sandpaper has this sparkly quality that will give the wall some twinkle, especially at night.
With a disarming twinkle he adds, "It is hard to know how to safeguard against this!"
